SEARCH
Package Model

Class HospitalZone

java.lang.Object
Model.HospitalZone
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class HospitalZone extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a Voronoi zone associated with a hospital.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    HospitalZone(List<Point> vertices, Hospital h)
    Creates a hospital zone with its vertices and center hospital.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getArea()
    Returns the area of the zone.
    double
    getAvgDistance()
    Returns the average distance between the center hospital and users.
    Hospital
    getCenterHospital()
    Returns the center hospital of the zone.
    double
    getDensity()
    Returns the density of users in the zone.
    double
    getMaxDistance()
    Returns the maximum distance between the center hospital and users.
    double
    getMinDistance()
    Returns the minimum distance between the center hospital and users.
    int
    getNbUser()
    Returns the number of users assigned to the zone.
    int
    getRedirectedCount()
    Returns the number of redirected users in the zone.
    List<Point>
    getVertices()
    Returns the vertices of the zone.
    void
    refresh()
    Refreshes statistics after modifications.
    void
    setCenterHospital(Hospital h)
    Updates the center hospital of the zone.

  • Constructor Details

    • HospitalZone

      public HospitalZone(List<Point> vertices, Hospital h)
      Creates a hospital zone with its vertices and center hospital.
      Parameters:
      vertices - the list of vertices that define the zone
      h - the hospital associated with the zone

  • Method Details

    • getNbUser

      public int getNbUser()
      Returns the number of users assigned to the zone.
      Returns:
      the number of users

    • getDensity

      public double getDensity()
      Returns the density of users in the zone.
      Returns:
      the user density

    • setCenterHospital

      Updates the center hospital of the zone.
      Parameters:
      h - the new center hospital

      Refreshes statistics after modifications.

      Returns the vertices of the zone.

      Returns the average distance between the center hospital and users.
